'''Precht''' was a fair-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] recruit in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought between the Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. At some point following the Alliance's formation, Precht had recently become a member,<ref name="JKTCG" /> and was a rookie [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel trooper]] aboard the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|42|Precht}}</ref> He excelled in [[Planet/Legends|planetside]] security missions while trying to impress the [[Starship/Legends|vessel's]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]], [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]],<ref name="JKTCG2">{{JKTCG|set=Masters of the Force|cardname=Trooper Recruit Precht • Quick Draw|link=http://www.decipher.com/jediknights/cardlists/mastersoftheforce/large/18trooperrecruitprecht.html}}</ref> and overall hoped to make a good impression with both the captain and his crew.<ref name="JKTCG" /> Precht wore the standard [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] trooper [[Alliance military uniform/Legends|uniform]]<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook">[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] includes a depiction of the standard [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] [[Rebel trooper/Legends|trooper]] [[Alliance military uniform/Legends|uniforms]], which matches the outfit worn by Precht.</ref> and was armed with a [[DH-17 blaster pistol/Legends|DH-17 blaster pistol]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Precht was first featured on a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] edition of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
